impersonate: Generate what the USER would say next in this conversation. Reply with the user message text only, no preamble or framing. Long-form welcome (a few sentences).
impersonate_short: Generate a short suggestion (under 15 words) for what the user might say next. Reply with the text only — no preamble, no quotes.
compact: Summarize the conversation so far so I can resume later. Keep goals, decisions, open questions, and next steps.
